---
title: "Mathematical Foundations of Machine Learning"
---

<div class="updated-time">Updated: 2026-03-30 17:59 AEDT</div>

This section collects notes on the mathematical foundations used in machine learning.
Tag legend: `Definition` marks a definition, `Theory` marks a theorem or principle, `Inference` marks a derivation step, and `Result` marks a conclusion or application takeaway.

- [Orthogonality](1%20Orthogonality.md)
- [Nonlinear Dynamics](2%20Nonlinear%20Dynmaics.md)
- [Four Fundamental Subspaces](3%20Linear-Algebra%20Four%20Subspaces.md)
- [Langevin Dynamics and Diffusion Model](4%20Langevin%20Dynamics%20and%20Diffusion%20Model.md)
- [Analytical Mechanics: Lagrangian and Hamiltonian Systems](5%20Lagrangian%20and%20Hamiltonian%20Mechanics.md)
